text: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G): Aims to provide a pucca house with basic amenities to all houseless householders and those households living in kutcha and dilapidated house by 2024. Eligibility: Families living in kutcha houses or houseless. Priority to SC/ST, bonded laborers, and non-SC/ST categories. Benefits: Financial assistance of ₹1.20 lakh in plain areas and ₹1.30 lakh in hilly/difficult areas for house construction.

PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi): A special micro-credit facility for street vendors to access affordable working capital loans. Eligibility: Street vendors in urban areas as of March 2020. Benefits: Initial working capital loan of up to ₹10,000. Interest subsidy of 7% on timely repayment. Eligibility for higher loans (₹20,000 and ₹50,000) on subsequent cycles.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

text: Atal Pension Yojana (APY): A social security scheme aimed at providing a steady stream of income after retirement to the workers in the unorganized sector. Eligibility: Any Indian citizen between 18 and 40 years. Benefits: Minimum guaranteed pension ranging from ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month after age 60, depending on the contribution.

Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY): A maternity benefit program providing cash incentives to pregnant and lactating mothers for the first living child. Eligibility: All Pregnant Women and Lactating Mothers (PW&LM), excluding those in regular employment with Central/State Govts. Benefits: Cash incentive of ₹5,000 in three installments upon fulfilling specific conditions related to maternal and child health.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
